name: TCIL_GetDeviceParameters
title: TCIL_GetDeviceParameters
syntax: long TCIL_GetDeviceParameters(byte addressClient, char designator[], char version[], byte deviceName[], char serialNumber[], byte structureLabel[], dword& lengthOfStructureLabel, byte localizationLabel[])); // form 1

long TCIL_GetDeviceParameters(dbNode tc, byte addressClient, char designator[], char version[], byte deviceName[], char serialNumber[], byte structureLabel[], dword& lengthOfStructureLabel, byte localizationLabel); // form 2
description: Returns parameters of the client device which are contained in the Device XML element (DVC) of the device description.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the TC client node the data entity belongs to.

parameters.name: designator
parameters.description: Returns the device designator of the client device (as a NULL-terminated string).

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Returns the software version of the client device (as a NULL-terminated string).

parameters.name: deviceName
parameters.description: Returns the NAME of the client device (as a byte array).

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Returns the serial number of the client device (as a NULL-terminated string).

parameters.name: structureLabel
parameters.description: Returns the label of device descriptor structure (as a byte array).

parameters.name: lengthOfStructureLabel
parameters.description: Returns the length of the structureLabel.

parameters.name: localizationLabel
parameters.description: Returns the label of the device descriptor localization (as a byte array).

return: Returns the device designator of the client

description: Example (Form 2, applicable in a test node)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
